checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue #266 authorized temporary public visibility for specbridge-v2 and specbridge-v3 so branch protection could be applied under GitHub Free.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: Tracked-file audit evidence, public visibility evidence, branch protection evidence, and CI evidence were recorded for both repositories.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The public visibility boundary was explicitly authorized by a dedicated contract. The work did not change production, billing, auth, database, deployment, dependencies, CI workflow code, or source files in v2/v3.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The tracked-file audit found no protected tracked filenames and no credential-like tracked content except one classified short sk- false positive in v2 STYLE_GUIDE.md.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: SpecBridge v1 file changes are restricted to the declared issue #266 evidence scope. External mutations were limited to repository visibility and branch protection for v2/v3.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: All local validators passed: validate-contracts.ps1, validate-contract-scopes.ps1, validate-final-reports.ps1, validate-audit-packets.ps1, validate-chatgpt-audits.ps1, git diff --check, and specbridge-smoke.ps1.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: The latest v2 and v3 CI runs on the protected heads completed successfully, and branch protection now requires the test check.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records that public exposure can be copied and rollback to private visibility requires a future dedicated contract.

findings.evidence: All required local validators passed after evidence files were created: validate-contracts.ps1, validate-contract-scopes.ps1, validate-final-reports.ps1, validate-audit-packets.ps1, validate-chatgpt-audits.ps1, git diff --check, and specbridge-smoke.ps1.
findings.recommendation: Proceed with PR open and CI gate.

unresolved_risks: Public exposure can be copied while v2/v3 remain public.
Rollback to private visibility requires a future dedicated contract.
